titleStmt.title: SII 4.1128: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1128. (A.R. No. 267 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
This inscription is written in continuation of No. 1127 above. in Epigraphia Indica, Vol. VI, p. 225.svasti samadigatapaṁccamahāṣabdamahāmaṇḍalēśvara kollipākāpuravarādhīśvara du¨rjjayakulakumudācaṁdra ripugaja
mrigēṁdra mallikāvallabha parāṁganādu[¨r*]llabha vilāsavidyādhara bhōgapuraṁdara kṛṣṇave¨rṇṇānadītīradakṣiṇaṣaṭsahasraviṣayādhīśvara vīramahēśvara kītrisudākara guṇaratnaratnākara vēṁgīcālukya
rājyamūlastaṁbha ripudalitakuṁbhikuṁbha jayāṁgganāgrihatōraṇa satyahariścaṁdra dīnānādhajanasasyapramēghava¨rṣa naṁbhbhani gaṁddavāraṇa nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁbuna śrīmanmahāmaṁ
ḍalēśvara [¨rga]muna naṁbhirāju koḍuku trailōkyamallerāju svasti śakava[¨r*]ṣaṁbulu 1081 nēṁṭṭi vaiśākha bahalapakṣa Aṣṭamiyu śanivāramuna śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvarakuṁ beṭṭina Akha
ya 1 ṇṭiki naluvuru bōla pūṁṭaṁgā muṇḍavunaḍavuna rajabō munaṁ beṭṭina InupaEḍlu 50 [.] ṇṭiki tribuvanaṁkkuśamāna nitya māneṇḍu 1 neyi
likhiṁta [peddanācā¨ryyēṇa] .
Digital edition of SII 4.1128 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
